reasoning: The control CCCS SC-12 focuses on cryptographic key establishment and management, which can be mapped to Kubernetes through the management of Secrets and etcd encryption. Kubernetes provides mechanisms for encrypting secrets at rest and supports integration with external secret management solutions, which can handle key rotation and lifecycle policies. While Kubernetes does not natively manage key rotation, it can be configured to use external systems that provide these capabilities.
title: CCCS SC-12: Cryptographic Key Establishment and Management
